title: Sun & Moon Fusion
description: Sun & Moon Fusion gives Minecraft a cleaner, more cartoony sun-and-moon-themed look
body:
## 📦 Sun & Moon Fusion
**Sun & Moon Fusion** is a **Java Edition resource pack** that refreshes Minecraft’s visuals with a custom set of textures inspired by **daytime warmth** and **nighttime serenity**. The pack keeps the **original Minecraft style** but enhances it with cleaner, more vibrant, and more atmospheric retextures.

Textures are redesigned with **subtle sun-and-moon accents** for a more immersive feel while staying true to the **classic Minecraft look**.

✅ **Recommended for players who**:

- Want a **fresh but vanilla-friendly** texture style

- Prefer **subtle enhancements** instead of drastic changes

- Enjoy **themed visuals** that feel cohesive both day and night

💬 If you want to **share feedback** or **ideas** about the project, please leave a comment on [**CurseForge**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/sun-moon-fusion/comments)

![Sun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab70de379994c9568fe3ab7f0b3579570128a126_0.webp)
